description: Send SSL-secured HTTP requests with a digital certificate for client authentication.

methods.name: get
methods.description: Sends an SSL-secured GET request to a remote server with a client certificate.

params.name: options.url
params.description: The URL to send the request to

params.name: options.certId
params.description: The script ID of the certificate

methods.name: post
methods.description: Sends an SSL-secured POST request to a remote server with a client certificate.

params.name: options.url
params.description: The URL to send the request to

params.name: options.certId
params.description: The script ID of the certificate

methods.name: put
methods.description: Sends an SSL-secured PUT request to a remote server with a client certificate.

params.name: options.url
params.description: The URL to send the request to

params.name: options.certId
params.description: The script ID of the certificate

methods.name: delete
methods.description: Sends an SSL-secured DELETE request to a remote server with a client certificate.

params.name: options.url
params.description: The URL to send the request to

params.name: options.certId
params.description: The script ID of the certificate

methods.name: request
methods.description: Sends an SSL-secured HTTP request with a client certificate using a specified method.

params.name: options.url
params.description: The URL to send the request to

params.name: options.certId
params.description: The script ID of the certificate
